title: Foreign Relations of the United States, 1958-1960, Near East Region; Iraq; Iran; Arabian Peninsula, Volume XII
source_org: US Department of State, Office of the Historian
notes: Editor: Edward C. Keefer; General Editor: Glenn W. LaFantasie; US GPO, Washington, 1993. This volume covers Near East Region, Iraq, Iran, Saudi Arabia, British Protectorates/Muscat and Oman, and Yemen together -- Iran section is Documents 224-305 ('U.S. high-level visits; Iranian reaction to the Iraqi coup; increased U.S. military assistance; U.S. interest in political and social reform; the Soviet military threat' for 1958, and 'Iranian requests for increased U.S. military assistance; Iranian-Soviet negotiations for a non-aggression pact; President Eisenhower's visit' for 1959-1960). NO compiled PDF is offered by the Office of the Historian for this volume (confirmed: only EPUB and Mobi links present on the volume page; direct guess at static.history.state.gov/frus/frus1958-60v12/pdf/frus1958-60v12.pdf returned HTTP 403, i.e. does not exist) -- downloaded the EPUB instead as the best available full-volume primary-source format. Mobi also available at https://static.history.state.gov/frus/frus1958-60v12/ebook/frus1958-60v12.mobi (2.04MB, not downloaded).

failures.method: curl (guessed URL, no PDF link present on page)
failures.result: HTTP 403 -- no compiled PDF exists for this volume, only EPUB/Mobi
